g.text: Keys stored as Hex-encoded strings in .txt files
Build TGT = Encrypt("Client" + Key_Client_TGS) via Key_AS_TGS
Decrypt AS_REP and extract Key_Client_TGS & TGT
Decrypt TGT using Key_AS_TGS to get Key_Client_TGS
Build Ticket_App = Encrypt(ClientID + Key_Client_App) via Key_TGS_App
Decrypt Ticket_App using Key_TGS_App to get Key_Client_App
